message:
fix(e2e): remove incorrect assertion on load command output

The load command returns the skill body content, not the skill ID.
Remove the assert_output_contains check for the skill ID since it
may not be present in the output depending on skill content format.

The test still validates that:
1. The load command succeeds (assert_success)
2. A checkpoint captures the post-load state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
